message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class User {
    int id
    string name
    string github（github地址）
    string sex
    string picture
}

User <|-- Teacher : extends
Teacher --> "1" Course : teaches via TeacherCourse
note right of TeacherCourse: “老师选课”类
Student --|> User : inherits from Student
Student --> n Experimentscore : has many scores for experiments 
Experimentscore - Scoreitem : contains multiple score items per experiment submission by student or teacher role user in system login module which also includes course related data like term credit etc., all linked through respective ids such as courseId associated with each entity involved here including those under 'C' category representing core components within this educational platform architecture where users can interact based on their roles defined during registration process using unique identifiers assigned upon creation time itself! 

Login <---> ExperimentCore <<interface>>  
ExperimentCore ..> ScorerItemImpl :: implements scoring logic according to predefined criteria set forth earlier mentioned above namely complexity completion answer quality assessment metrics respectively denoted accordingly next section below detailing further specifics regarding how these values get calculated automatically once submitted successfully without any manual intervention required whatsoever except perhaps initial setup configuration steps taken beforehand just before actual usage begins officially speaking anyway...  

ScoreItemsCollectionHolder holds references back up towards parent objects so they may be accessed easily later down line if needed again sometime soon enough hopefully sooner rather than late due mainly because efficiency matters greatly nowadays especially given current technological advancements being made daily across various fields ranging everywhere between artificial intelligence machine
